description: You are a clinical researcher at a pharmaceutical company conducting a systematic drug interaction study for an oncology pharmacovigilance dossier. Document the simultaneous interaction profile of crizotinib against acenocoumarol and fluconazole using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Perform a single combined query for both co-medications and remain on the results screen showing both interaction ratings concurrently.

metadata.industry: Pharmaceutical Industry / Drug Safety / Oncology Pharmacovigilance
metadata.expected_end_screen: Results screen showing both interaction pairs simultaneously
metadata.task_feature: Multi-select co-medication workflow — both co-medications must appear on the same Results screen
metadata.clinical_context: Pharmacovigilance dossier requiring concurrent interaction documentation for two co-medications
